B2.label: Brand Archetype (e.g., The Creator, The Explorer, The Sage)

B5.label: If your brand were a person, how would you describe their personality?

B6.label: What emotions should people feel when interacting with your brand?

B7.label: Brand Promise — what do you guarantee to your customers?

C1_1.label: Primary Target Audience — demographics (age, gender, income, education)

C1_2.label: Primary Target Audience — psychographics (values, interests, lifestyle)

C1_3.label: What is the #1 pain point your audience faces?

C1_4.label: What is the #1 desire or aspiration of your audience?

C1_5.label: Where does your audience spend time online? (platforms, communities)

C1_6.label: What language/tone does your audience use? (formal, casual, technical)

C2_1.label: How do customers typically discover your brand?

C2_2.label: What is the typical decision-making process for your customers?

C2_3.label: What are the main objections or hesitations before purchasing?

C2_4.label: What does the post-purchase experience look like?

D4.label: Flagship offering — the one thing you want to be known for

E1.label: Colors you love for this brand (or existing brand colors)

E2.label: Colors you absolutely do NOT want

E3.label: Visual style preference (minimalist, bold, organic, geometric, luxurious)

E4.label: Brands whose visual identity you admire (and why)

E5.label: Any existing brand assets? (logo, fonts, style guide)

F1.label: 3 adjectives that describe how your brand should sound

F2.label: Words or phrases your brand should NEVER use

F3.label: Communication style (authoritative, friendly, playful, technical, poetic)

F4.label: Content formats you plan to use (blog, social, video, podcast, email)

G1.label: Primary business goal for the next 12 months

G2.label: What does success look like in 90 days?

G3.label: Key metrics you track (revenue, leads, engagement, retention)

G5.label: Are you launching something new, rebranding, or scaling?

H1.label: Top 3 direct competitors (with URLs if possible)

H2.label: What do competitors do well that you respect?

H3.label: What do competitors do poorly that you want to avoid?

H4.label: How do you want to be perceived DIFFERENTLY from competitors?
